recommendations.title: Call Jane
recommendations.overview: A married woman with an unwanted pregnancy lives in a time in America where she can't get a legal abortion and works with a group of suburban women to find help.

recommendations.title: Hungry Hearts
recommendations.overview: The relationship of a couple who meet by chance in New York City is put to the test when they encounter a life or death circumstance.

recommendations.title: How to Have Sex
recommendations.overview: Three British teenage girls go on a rites-of-passage holiday—drinking, clubbing and hooking up, in what should be the best summer of their lives.

recommendations.title: All Is Bright
recommendations.overview: Two ne’er-do-wells from Quebec travel to New York City with a scheme to get rich quick selling Christmas trees.

recommendations.title: They Look Like People
recommendations.overview: Suspecting that people are transforming into malevolent shape-shifters, Wyatt flees to New York City to seek out his estranged childhood friend Christian.

recommendations.title: Daisies
recommendations.overview: Two teenage girls embark on a series of destructive pranks in which they consume and destroy the world around them.

recommendations.title: Jimi: All Is by My Side
recommendations.overview: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

recommendations.title: The English Teacher
recommendations.overview: Small-town Pennsylvania schoolteacher Linda Sinclair balances her staid home life with an incredible passion for her subject. Then a former star pupil reenters her life after failing as a playwright in New York City. Seeing in his script the inspirat

recommendations.title: Transamerica
recommendations.overview: A transgender woman takes an unexpected journey when she learns that she had a son, now a teenage runaway hustling on the streets of New York.

recommendations.title: Hello, Dolly!
